3107920.name: ONLY UP: MEMOLOGY (3d remastered edition)
3107920.description:
Do you know how to pass typical russian exam? You may think that it's typical exam where you will have some questions... Do you know that for passing that exam typical russian need to know pictures from russian memes? It will be more easier for you to cheat with small tips like answers on meme-exam!

With one big exception... the game is based on "OnlyUp" (parkour game) mechanics.

It's so easy - even if you don't know main game, then you can jump as far as you can, right?

In addition to the main idea of ​​the classic “OnlyUp” style, choosing the right answers to questions will influence your further path to the top! You need to jump on right platform (it will be easy even if you don't understand meaning of words on platforms). There is no chance for error here - one wrong step and you will fly down to start again.

You will navigate through moving platforms and other daunting obstacles.

Other features:
-gameplay over two hours (if you beat the game faster, write to us);
-incredible music;
-Easter eggs in the form of musical Gacha sounds;
-the main character from the Gacha universe;

This game is a remake (made for all people - even if you don't know first version of a game) of the famous MEMOLOGY:GOYDA in narrow circles: Unified State Examination on Memes!

If you intend to continue, then don't give up halfway!
